perturbation_goal: Check whether the same Warehouse evidence changes admission when verification state or recipient scope changes.

perturbation_variants.source_scope_change: Treat hb10_hidden_3 as quarantined_sensor, not verified_sensor.

add_rejections.rationale: The same noxious-gas text should not become a blocking admission while quarantined.

perturbation_variants.expected_downstream_delta: The row should become insufficient_admissible_evidence, because Warehouse B cannot be safely blocked from admitted facts.
perturbation_variants.baseline_pressure: A semantic card-packing baseline may still pick the gas fact; admission scoring must penalize that if verification state is ignored.

perturbation_variants.source_scope_change: Keep hb10_hidden_2 verified, but make it eligible only for logistics_planner and not final_decider.
perturbation_variants.expected_downstream_delta: Final_decider cannot claim a complete Warehouse C enabler unless a separate allowed report edge is introduced.
perturbation_variants.baseline_pressure: Shared-context and CICL-style packing should be checked for over-sharing this fact to final_decider.

packet_gate_note: Do not materialize this row until the evaluator can distinguish verification_reject from semantic irrelevance.

perturbation_goal: Check whether disabling and enabling venue facts obey verification and recipient scope rather than option salience.

perturbation_variants.source_scope_change: Treat hb11_hidden_1 as unverified_repair_claim rather than verified_recovery_report.

add_rejections.rationale: The same restroom-restoration text should not enable School Gym until verified.

perturbation_variants.expected_downstream_delta: The row should become insufficient_admissible_evidence, because the main School Gym repair fact is not admissible.
perturbation_variants.baseline_pressure: Option-answer accuracy alone would hide this failure; scoring must require the enabler unit.

perturbation_variants.source_scope_change: Keep hb11_hidden_0 verified, but make it eligible only for facilities_checker and not final_decider.
perturbation_variants.expected_downstream_delta: Final_decider should not directly cite the library fuel blocker unless an allowed facilities summary edge is added.
perturbation_variants.baseline_pressure: Shared verified context should become an explicit baseline that may over-admit this blocker.

packet_gate_note: Do not score this row only by selecting School Gym; the perturbations must change admitted blocker/enabler obligations.

perturbation_goal: Strengthen the sanity row by adding verification and dependency-scope pressure to route blockers and West City accessibility.

perturbation_variants.source_scope_change: Treat hb01_shared_3 as unverified_public_notice rather than verified_public_route_notice.

add_rejections.rationale: The same river-level text should not establish West City accessibility while unverified.

perturbation_variants.expected_downstream_delta: The row should become insufficient_admissible_evidence, because the remaining route for West City is not verified.
perturbation_variants.baseline_pressure: A source-density baseline may keep the bridge fact; admission legality must reject it under this state.

perturbation_variants.source_scope_change: Keep both North Hill blockers verified, but expose trail closure only to route_planner and driveway mudslide only to risk_checker, with no allowed cross-role group edge.

add_rejections.rationale: No single recipient can assemble the complete North Hill blocker without an allowed cross-role dependency edge.

perturbation_variants.expected_downstream_delta: The row should not count North Hill as fully blocked for final_decider unless the packet explicitly adds a group edge.
perturbation_variants.baseline_pressure: Shared-context baselines will likely assemble the blocker; that makes this variant useful for testing over-sharing.

packet_gate_note: This row remains a sanity row unless the evaluator makes verification and dependency-scope failures visible.
